notes:
Ember 1.9.4 — Real screen lock, Mic On button, ad-blocker caveat

• 'Lock PC' (from Ember Link or the panic button) could silently fall back to just putting the display to sleep instead of actually locking the session if the old CGSession trick failed on newer macOS — it now uses the OS-native Control+Command+Q lock shortcut first, and honestly reports failure instead of claiming 'locked' when it only slept the display.
• Added the missing 'Mic On' button next to 'Mic Off' on the phone remote — there was previously no way to undo a mic mute from the phone (this is likely why the mic seemed to stop working after tapping Mic Off: the system input volume stayed at 0 with no way to restore it).
• The Ad Blocker now explains that some browsers' 'Secure DNS' setting bypasses a hosts-file-based blocker entirely (it never asks the OS to resolve the domain) — Ember Browser's own ad blocking isn't affected by that.

Builds on 1.9.3's Command Center fixes, Ember Link tablet mode, and explicit permission prompts.
